name: angeo/module-aeo-audit
description: Magento 2 AEO (AI Engine Optimization) Audit Tool. Checks 9 signals: robots.txt AI bot access, llms.txt spec validation, llms.jsonl machine-readable catalog, Product/FAQ schema, sitemap, AI product feed, OG tags, canonical. Includes Score Trend dashboard, Admin UI, cron scheduling, and dynamic fix commands.

suggest.angeo/module-robots-txt-aeo: Fix Signal #1 — robots.txt AI bot access
suggest.angeo/module-llms-txt: Fix Signals #2 and #2b — generate llms.txt and llms.jsonl
suggest.angeo/module-rich-data: Fix Signals #4 and #5 — Product JSON-LD schema and FAQPage schema
suggest.angeo/module-openai-product-feed: Fix Signal #6 — ACP product feed for ChatGPT Shopping
suggest.angeo/module-openai-product-feed-api: Fix Signal #6 — REST API endpoints for ACP feed
